heading: Simplified dollar-value LIFO method for certain small businesses
label: 474 Simplified dollar-value LIFO method for certain small businesses
notes: Amendments1986— amended section generally, substituting provisions relating to election by eligible small business to use simplified dollar-value method of pricing inventories for purposes of LIFO method for provisions relating to election by eligible small business which uses dollar-value method of pricing inventories under method provided by to use one inventory pool for any trade or business of such eligible small business.Pub. L. 99–514section 472(b) of this title

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: An eligible small business may elect to use the simplified dollar-value method of pricing inventories for purposes of the LIFO method.

children.heading: Simplified dollar-value method of pricing inventories
children.label: b Simplified dollar-value method of pricing inventories
A
children.text: the taxpayer maintains a separate inventory pool for items in each major category in the applicable Government price index, and

children.label: B
children.text: the adjustment for each such separate pool is based on the change from the preceding taxable year in the component of such index for the major category.

children.label: A
children.text: except as provided in subparagraph (B), the Producer Price Index published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a retailer using the retail method, the Consumer Price Index published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of the Producer Price Index, any of the 2-digit standard industrial classifications in the Producer Prices Data Report, or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of the Consumer Price Index, any of the general expenditure categories in the Consumer Price Index Detailed Report.

children.heading: Eligible small business
children.label: c Eligible small business
children.text: For purposes of this section, a taxpayer is an eligible small business for any taxable year if the average annual gross receipts of the taxpayer for the 3 preceding taxable years do not exceed $5,000,000. For purposes of the preceding sentence, rules similar to the rules of section 448(c)(3) shall apply.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: In the case of a taxpayer which is a member of a controlled group, all persons which are component members of such group shall be treated as 1 taxpayer for purposes of determining the gross receipts of the taxpayer.

children.heading: Controlled group defined
children.label: B Controlled group defined
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), persons shall be treated as being component members of a controlled group if such persons would be treated as a single employer under section 52.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The election under this section may be made without the consent of the Secretary.

children.heading: Period to which election applies
children.label: B Period to which election applies
i
children.text: to the taxable year for which it is made, and

children.label: ii
children.text: to all subsequent taxable years for which the taxpayer is an eligible small business,

children.heading: LIFO method
children.label: 3 LIFO method
children.text: The term “LIFO method” means the method provided by section 472(b).

children.label: I
children.text: in the case of the 1st taxable year to which such an election applies, be established in accordance with the major categories in the applicable Government price index, or

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of the 1st taxable year after such election ceases to apply, be established in the manner provided by regulations under section 472;

children.label: ii
children.text: the aggregate dollar amount of the taxpayer’s inventory as of the beginning of the year of change shall be the same as the aggregate dollar value as of the close of the taxable year preceding the year of change, and

children.label: iii
children.text: the year of change shall be treated as a new base year in accordance with procedures provided by regulations under section 472.

children.label: i
children.text: the 1st taxable year to which an election under this section applies, or

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of a cessation of such an election, the 1st taxable year after such election ceases to apply.
